# CladFacts

> Independent newspaper-format fact-checks of news broadcasts. Letter grades,
> factuality scores, and political-lean ratings — AI-assisted research,
> human-reviewed before publish.

Site: https://cladfacts.com
App: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6781372681

## Key pages

- /how-it-works/ (methodology; /methodology/ redirects here)
- /about/
- /corrections/
- /bias/
- /politicians/ (candidate & officeholder report cards)
- /trends/
- /week/ (week in grades)
- /rss.xml
- /api/posts.json (public feed; grades null for anonymous consumers)

## Access

- Anonymous: article text + daily free sample report card
- Free account: full scoreboard (grades, lean, charts, search filters)
- Premium: optional supporter tier (funds the newsroom; Reader Reactions)

## Contact

support@cladfacts.com
